validation.redactionBoundary: synthetic review-result validator fixtures only; no real validation receipt, response envelope path, account, credential, provider payload, response payload, order payload, token, app key, app secret, execution, fill, or order confirmation content

promotionRules: future review result can be recorded only after owner-assisted response receipt review
review result cannot record private receipt paths, raw responses, or provider payloads
review result success still does not authorize provider calls
review result success still does not enable runtime routes, UI, DB writes, orders, or live trading
